# Liatrio Daily Lead Research — 2026-05-27\n\nPaste everything below into Claude and ask it to research contacts.\n\n---\n\nI work at Liatrio, an enterprise AI and DevOps transformation consultancy. We help large enterprises with: Enterprise AI enablement, DevOps transformation, platform engineering, application modernization (cloud-native), cloud migration, security & compliance (DevSecOps), and workforce enablement/coaching.\n\nBelow are today's top 10 target companies based on trigger events that signal they may need Liatrio's services. For EACH company, please:\n\n1. Search LinkedIn and Google for 5-10 contacts at the company who would be the right decision-makers or influencers for Liatrio's offerings (CIO, CTO, VP of Engineering, Director of Platform Engineering, Director of DevOps, Head of Cloud, Enterprise Architect, etc.)\n2. For each contact, provide: Name, Title, LinkedIn URL\n3. Write a short personalized outreach message referencing the trigger event\n\n---\n\n## #1: CAE Inc (Signal Score: 25)\n\n**Liatrio Service Fit:** Digital Transformation\n**Suggested Angle:** Liatrio drives holistic transformation across people, process, and technology. Reference the leadership change and offer a strategy session.\n\n**Trigger Events:**\n- [Digital Transformation] E.J. WARD INC. Offer a cloud migration assessment.\n\n**Trigger Events:**\n- [Cloud Migration] DOD gearing up for EHR cloud migration with Leidos expected to score big contract extension - DefenseScoop\n  Source: DefenseScoop | https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMioAFBVV95cUxQNXlhXzJ4N2pwaVVzT2hOLVhUb3FKM3pFZEpjNGhXaWd1NnJxM1B5M2FuMkk0bjdWdVlILWZKSTlKVVhZa2NGV3B6cDFuMkp6TTZkZWhpckdUbkZTQk03cTU3RVJtaWd3RFJESW5yS1F5YjVibFhtN2hEN3IxdmNMSUpLRnVEZDdsZk8wUHlwa0cteDF1YjJlWENBOXUzU0Rs?oc=5\n- [Digital Transformation] Leidos Holdings stock (US5253271028): earnings, defense demand and digital transformation in focus - AD HOC NEWS\n  Source: AD HOC NEWS | https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiyAFBVV95cUxOQWR2Y0dBQXo5RXl0YTVreU1wMjlQbC1obnNha2NpV0xVcGlDdjhIYTVVbUZSemlQSFZaYW5aWFJFdTZDcGFTTFpDWllVSzdYVThock9qeXNLOGh6bTU3NzVwMkVqMXlaclRMazF4czJxNTdiRG00bXBGaEdHbEJJWDJYeW9LRlZROEo3ZjlyaGVuWThRRHdLNDYybTkyeGlKLXVqeU42a2Z0bXgwUjZ5UHMxcGRfZ0dxSkVZRDBhSVFNMkV0a25TTw?oc=5\n- [Digital Transformation] Assessing Leidos Holdings (LDOS) Valuation After New U.S. Defense And IT Modernization Contracts - simplywall.st\n  Source: simplywall.st | https://news.google.?oc=5\n- [Enterprise AI] Leidos Teams Up With Trustible to Automate AI Governance - ExecutiveBiz\n  Source: ExecutiveBiz | https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMihAFBVV95cUxNcjA2UE8xM3JuYjRYS3JHcmFmMWlmczNsbVpDZFJWSFRiYzJrZDN2Q3RoQU1reEtiYjBDU2NFYmgtVzFvd2IxV2lHemJDU3c4WEtsTnVJQTR1YzQ4c2laT2dVdENmc2Mzcm5BWDYydjFaSk9uVVRnOF9RSFcyY3hGQlpxNVc?oc=5\n- [Digital Transformation] Leidos and Sky Solutions launch Purple Sky joint venture to accelerate federal digital transformation - PR Newswire\n  Source: PR Newswire | https://news.google.?oc=5\n\n---\n\n## #10: Roper Technologies (Signal Score: 6)\n\n**Liatrio Service Fit:** Enterprise AI\n**Suggested Angle:** Liatrio helps enterprises move from AI pilots to production-scale AI.
